---
title: "Shiny"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# LIBRERÍAS NECESARIAS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
library(shiny)
library(shinydashboard)
library(caret)
library(e1071)
library(kernlab)
library(C50)
library(randomForest)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# INTERFAZ DE USUARIO (UI)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
ui <- dashboardPage(
  skin = "blue",
  dashboardHeader(title = "Panel de Clasificación"),
  
  dashboardSidebar(
    sidebarMenu(
      menuItem("Carga de Datos", tabName = "data", icon = icon("database")),
      menuItem("Entrenamiento y Modelos", tabName = "models", icon = icon("cogs")),
      menuItem("Comparativa de Resultados", tabName = "comparison", icon = icon("chart-bar"))
    )
  ),
  
  dashboardBody(
    tabItems(
      # --- PESTAÑA 1: Carga de datos ---
      tabItem(
        tabName = "data",
        fluidRow(
          box(
            title = "Cargar Archivo de Datos", width = 12, status = "primary", solidHeader = TRUE,
            fileInput("file1", "Seleccionar archivo TXT o CSV",
                      multiple = FALSE,
                      accept = c("text/csv", "text/comma-separated-values,text/plain", ".csv", ".txt")),
            checkboxInput("header", "El archivo tiene encabezado (Header)", TRUE),
            radioButtons("sep", "Separador de columnas:",
                         choices = c(Coma = ",", Punto_y_Coma = ";", Tabulación = "\t", Espacio = " "),
                         selected = ","), # CAMBIO: Por defecto Coma para archivos CSV
            hr(),
            sliderInput("p_train", "Porcentaje de entrenamiento (Train %):",
                        min = 50, max = 90, value = 67, step = 1)
          )
        ),
        fluidRow(
          box(
            title = "Vista previa del dataset", width = 12, status = "info",
            verbatimTextOutput("data_summary"),
            tableOutput("contents")
          )
        )
      ),
      
      # --- PESTAÑA 2: Entrenamiento y Parámetros ---
      tabItem(
        tabName = "models",
        fluidRow(
          box(
            title = "Parámetros de los Modelos", width = 4, status = "warning", solidHeader = TRUE,
            sliderInput("k_val", "kNN (Número de vecinos k):", min = 1, max = 21, value = 3, step = 2),
            numericInput("laplace_val", "Naive Bayes (Laplace smoothing):", value = 0, min = 0, max = 5),
            selectInput("kernel_val", "SVM (Tipo de Kernel):", 
                        choices = c("Lineal (vanilladot)" = "vanilladot", "Gaussiano/RBF (rbfdot)" = "rbfdot")),
            numericInput("trials_val", "C5.0 (Boosting trials):", value = 1, min = 1, max = 50),
            numericInput("ntree_val", "Random Forest (Número de árboles):", value = 100, min = 10, max = 1000, step = 50)
          ),
          
          box(
            title = "Resultados e Inspección de Modelos", width = 8, status = "primary", solidHeader = TRUE,
            tabsetPanel(
              tabPanel("kNN", verbatimTextOutput("knn_out")),
              tabPanel("Naive Bayes", verbatimTextOutput("nb_out")),
              tabPanel("SVM", verbatimTextOutput("svm_out")),
              tabPanel("C5.0", verbatimTextOutput("c50_out")),
              tabPanel("Random Forest", 
                       verbatimTextOutput("rf_out"),
                       plotOutput("rf_plot"))
            )
          )
        )
      ),
      
      # --- PESTAÑA 3: Comparativa ---
      tabItem(
        tabName = "comparison",
        fluidRow(
          box(
            title = "Tabla Resumen de Rendimiento", width = 12, status = "success", solidHeader = TRUE,
            tableOutput("summary_table"),
            plotOutput("comparison_plot")
          )
        )
      )
    )
  )
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# LÓGICA DEL SERVIDOR (SERVER)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  # 1. Carga de datos reactiva con lectura robusta
  data_raw <- reactive({
    req(input$file1)
    
    # Intento 1: Leer con el separador seleccionado por el usuario
    df <- read.table(input$file1$datapath, 
                     header = input$header, 
                     sep = input$sep, 
                     stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
                     strip.white = TRUE)
    
    # AUTODETECCIÓN: Si falla y devuelve solo 1 columna, probar otros separadores estándar
    if (ncol(df) == 1) {
      posibles_seps <- c(",", ";", "\t", " ")
      for (s in posibles_seps) {
        temp_df <- read.table(input$file1$datapath, 
                              header = input$header, 
                              sep = s, 
                              stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
                              strip.white = TRUE)
        if (ncol(temp_df) > 1) {
          df <- temp_df
          break
        }
      }
    }
    
    return(df)
  })

  # Vista previa de datos
  output$contents <- renderTable({
    head(data_raw(), 5)
  })
  
  output$data_summary <- renderPrint({
    summary(data_raw())
  })
  
  # 2. Procesamiento y evaluación con validación de seguridad
  models_results <- reactive({
    df <- data_raw()
    req(df)
    
    # Validar que el archivo se haya separado en más de 1 columna
    validate(
      need(ncol(df) > 1, "Error al leer el archivo: Comprueba el 'Separador' seleccionado en la Pestaña 1. Actualmente solo se detectó 1 columna.")
    )
    
    pClass <- ncol(df)
    
    # Extraer la clase objetivo (última columna)
    y_raw <- factor(df[, pClass])
    if (nlevels(y_raw) == 2) {
      levels(y_raw) <- c("No", "Si")
    }
    
    # Convertir predictores a numéricos
    X_raw <- df[, 1:(pClass - 1), drop = FALSE]
    X_num <- as.data.frame(lapply(X_raw, function(col) {
      as.numeric(as.character(col))
    }))
    
    df_clean <- X_num
    df_clean$class <- y_raw
    
    # Eliminar filas con NAs
    df_clean <- df_clean[complete.cases(df_clean), ]
    
    # Validar que queden suficientes filas
    validate(
      need(nrow(df_clean) >= 10, paste("Se encontraron solo", nrow(df_clean), "filas válidas. Revisa si la conversión introdujo NAs o si el separador es correcto."))
    )
    
    # Normalización Min-Max
    normalize <- function(x) {
      rng <- range(x, na.rm = TRUE)
      if (rng[1] == rng[2]) return(rep(0, length(x)))
      return((x - rng[1]) / (rng[2] - rng[1]))
    }
    
    var_num <- 1:(ncol(df_clean) - 1)
    df_norm <- df_clean
    df_norm[, var_num] <- as.data.frame(lapply(df_clean[, var_num, drop = FALSE], normalize))
    
    # Partición Train / Test
    set.seed(123)
    train_idx <- createDataPartition(df_clean$class, p = input$p_train / 100, list = FALSE)
    
    train_orig <- df_clean[train_idx, ]
    test_orig  <- df_clean[-train_idx, ]
    
    train_norm <- df_norm[train_idx, ]
    test_norm  <- df_norm[-train_idx, ]
    
    y_test <- test_orig$class
    
    # --- MODELOS ---
    # A) kNN
    set.seed(123)
    pred_knn <- class::knn(train = train_norm[, var_num, drop = FALSE], 
                           test  = test_norm[, var_num, drop = FALSE], 
                           cl    = train_norm$class, 
                           k     = input$k_val)
    cm_knn <- confusionMatrix(pred_knn, y_test)
    
    # B) Naive Bayes
    set.seed(123)
    nb_mod <- naiveBayes(class ~ ., data = train_orig, laplace = input$laplace_val)
    pred_nb <- predict(nb_mod, test_orig)
    cm_nb <- confusionMatrix(pred_nb, y_test)
    
    # C) SVM
    set.seed(123)
    svm_mod <- ksvm(class ~ ., data = train_norm, kernel = input$kernel_val)
    pred_svm <- predict(svm_mod, test_norm)
    cm_svm <- confusionMatrix(pred_svm, y_test)
    
    # D) C5.0
    set.seed(123)
    c50_mod <- C5.0(class ~ ., data = train_orig, trials = input$trials_val)
    pred_c50 <- predict(c50_mod, test_orig)
    cm_c50 <- confusionMatrix(pred_c50, y_test)
    
    # E) Random Forest
    set.seed(123)
    rf_mod <- randomForest(class ~ ., data = train_orig, ntree = input$ntree_val)
    pred_rf <- predict(rf_mod, test_orig)
    cm_rf <- confusionMatrix(pred_rf, y_test)
    
    list(
      cm_knn = cm_knn,
      cm_nb  = cm_nb,
      cm_svm = cm_svm,
      cm_c50 = cm_c50,
      cm_rf  = cm_rf,
      rf_mod = rf_mod
    )
  })

  # 3. Salidas de texto e inspección
  output$knn_out <- renderPrint({ models_results()$cm_knn })
  output$nb_out  <- renderPrint({ models_results()$cm_nb })
  output$svm_out <- renderPrint({ models_results()$cm_svm })
  output$c50_out <- renderPrint({ models_results()$cm_c50 })
  output$rf_out  <- renderPrint({ models_results()$cm_rf })
  
  output$rf_plot <- renderPlot({
    req(models_results())
    varImpPlot(models_results()$rf_mod, main = "Importancia de Variables (Random Forest)")
  })

  # 4. Tabla y gráfico comparativo
  summary_df <- reactive({
    res <- models_results()
    data.frame(
      Algoritmo = c("kNN", "Naive Bayes", "SVM", "C5.0", "Random Forest"),
      Accuracy  = c(res$cm_knn$overall["Accuracy"],
                    res$cm_nb$overall["Accuracy"],
                    res$cm_svm$overall["Accuracy"],
                    res$cm_c50$overall["Accuracy"],
                    res$cm_rf$overall["Accuracy"]),
      Kappa     = c(res$cm_knn$overall["Kappa"],
                    res$cm_nb$overall["Kappa"],
                    res$cm_svm$overall["Kappa"],
                    res$cm_c50$overall["Kappa"],
                    res$cm_rf$overall["Kappa"])
    )
  })

  output$summary_table <- renderTable({
    summary_df()
  }, digits = 4)

  output$comparison_plot <- renderPlot({
    df <- summary_df()
    barplot(rbind(df$Accuracy, df$Kappa), 
            beside = TRUE, 
            names.arg = df$Algoritmo,
            col = c("steelblue", "orange"),
            legend.text = c("Accuracy", "Kappa"),
            args.legend = list(x = "topleft"),
            main = "Comparativa de Precisión (Accuracy) y Kappa entre Modelos",
            ylim = c(0, 1))
  })
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# EJECUCIÓN
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)
```
